name: Black Fury Eau de Parfum
short: A bold, smoky eau de parfum with an intense sillage — designed for evenings that demand to be remembered.
description: Black Fury is a bold, smoky eau de parfum for those who refuse to go unnoticed. The composition opens with a sharp flash of spice, settles into a heart of dark woods and leather, and dries down to a warm, sensual base of amber and musk. Composed at high concentration for exceptional sillage and 10+ hour longevity. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier, each 50ml flacon is weighted with a brass-tone cap. Designed for evenings that demand to be remembered.
benefits: High concentration for 10+ hour wear and bold sillage
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
Hand-finished and numbered in our Udaipur atelier
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. Best worn in the evening or cooler weather.
